title: Specklinia trulla
taxonomy: Specklinia trulla is classified as a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae. It belongs to the genus Specklinia, which is a group of small to medium-sized orchids native to Central and South America. The classification of Specklinia trulla is further divided into the subfamily Epidendroideae, which is a large and diverse group of orchids. Within the Epidendroideae subfamily, Specklinia trulla is assigned to the tribe Cranichideae. The exact classification may vary depending on the source, but Specklinia trulla is generally recognized as a member of the Orchidaceae family.

The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help in treating wounds, skin infections, and other conditions.
